items.name: swiftui-content-core
items.title: Content Core (SwiftUI)
items.description: Shared SwiftUI renderer configuration + ContentTreeWire Codable mirror for app-owned Nostr content components.

items.name: swiftui-content-minimal
items.title: Content Minimal (SwiftUI)
items.description: Minimal SwiftUI Nostr content renderer with inline text, mentions, links, and hashtags.

items.name: swiftui-content-mention-chip
items.title: Content Mention Chip (SwiftUI)
items.description: Tappable profile mention chip with optional avatar and identicon fallback.

items.name: swiftui-content-media-grid
items.title: Content Media Grid (SwiftUI)
items.description: Photo-style media grid with 1/2/3/4+ layouts and +N more overlay.

items.name: swiftui-content-quote-card
items.title: Content Quote Card (SwiftUI)
items.description: Reusable quote/embed card with collapsed, compact, rich, and missing variants.

items.name: swiftui-content-view
items.title: Content View (SwiftUI)
items.description: Full SwiftUI ContentTreeWire renderer covering all WireNode variants: inline runs (text/mention/hashtag/url/emoji/emphasis/strong/inline-code/link/soft+hard breaks), blocks (paragraph/heading/code/list/quote/rule/image), media, event refs, and typed placeholders.

items.name: compose-content-core
items.title: Content Core (Compose)
items.description: Shared Compose renderer configuration + ContentTreeWire kotlinx.serialization mirror for app-owned Nostr content components.

items.name: compose-content-mention-chip
items.title: Content Mention Chip (Compose)
items.description: Tappable Compose profile mention chip with optional avatar and identicon fallback.

items.name: compose-content-media-grid
items.title: Content Media Grid (Compose)
items.description: Compose photo-style media grid with 1/2/3/4+ layouts and +N more overlay.

items.name: compose-content-quote-card
items.title: Content Quote Card (Compose)
items.description: Reusable Compose quote/embed card with collapsed, compact, rich, and missing variants.

items.name: compose-content-view
items.title: Content View (Compose)
items.description: Full Compose ContentTreeWire renderer covering all WireNode variants: inline runs (text/mention/hashtag/url/emoji/emphasis/strong/inline-code/link/soft+hard breaks), blocks (paragraph/heading/code/list/quote/rule/image), media, event refs, and typed placeholders.
